name: Red-Braised Beef
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Beef chuck, cut into 1 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a saucepan over high heat until the oil is smoking.
Add beef cubes and cook until they are browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
2. Add minced ginger and scallions; stir fry for another 30 seconds until aromatic.
3. Pour in dry sherry and dark soy sauce. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
4. Stir in star anise and sugar. Gradually add water so that the cooking juices remain about one-third of the total liquid.
5. Simmer gently until the beef is tender when pierced with a fork, approximately 45 minutes to 1 hour.
6. If there are excess juices remaining, remove the meat and reduce the sauce over high heat until thickened. Serve the meat in its juices.
This dish improves if prepared ahead of time and reheated. It also freezes beautifully.
